public_statement.claim: The current taste lane object is not geometry-bearing under the tested evaluation represented in this repository.
non_claims: This repository does not claim that biological taste coding is impossible.
This repository does not settle disputed models of cortical taste organization.
This repository does not claim that a different native taste object could never support a geometry-bearing representation.

interpretation: The current taste lane object does not preserve a stable geometry-bearing representation under the tested evaluation once full identity carry-through is removed from the claim surface.
Exact replay parity does not provide a stronger public claim than direct decode of the same packet fields.
The strongest positive control depends on preserving full packet identity rather than on a reduced geometric representation.
scientific_boundaries: This is a bounded result about the current taste lane object.
This artifact does not prove that biological taste coding is impossible.
This artifact does not rule out future success with a different native taste object.
